description: Add a static route to the dedicated gateway.

AccountId.description: Account ID to which the dedicated gateway route belongs.

CreationTime.description: Time when the dedicated gateway route was created.

DestinationCidrBlock.description: Destination network segment of the dedicated gateway route.

NextHopId.description: Next hop instance ID for the dedicated gateway route.

NextHopType.description: Type of the next hop instance for the dedicated gateway route. Valid values: VIF: Virtual Interface CEN: Cloud Enterprise Network TransitRouter: Transit Router.

RouteType.description: Type of the dedicated gateway route. Valid values: BGP: BGP dynamic route Static: Static route CEN: Cloud Enterprise Network route, that is, after the dedicated gateway joins the Cloud Enterprise Network, routes synchronized from the Cloud Enterprise Network.

Status.description: Status of the dedicated gateway route. Creating: Creating Deleting: Deleting Pending: Configuring Available: Available.
